name: micro-learning
tagline: Micro learning on G2 — topics and scores
description: Micro Learning helps you capture topics for research, review your list on the glasses, and track a learning score. Configure OpenAI and ElevenLabs on the phone.
author: Ivan Vlaevski

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture audio on glasses for “Record new topic” (PCM to ElevenLabs STT).
